column1: 多かれ少なかれ、誰でも悩みを抱えている。
column2: おおかれすくなかれ、だれでもなやみをかかえている。
column3: To a greater or lesser degree, everyone has worries.
column4: 〜かれ〜かれ (whether more or less ~, to a greater or lesser degree)
column5: Adj[stem] + かれ + Adj[same stem or antonym] + かれ
column6: used in fixed expressions like 多かれ少なかれ (to a greater or lesser extent) or 遅かれ早かれ (sooner or later)
column8: かれ〜かれ = degree variation both included; にせよ〜にせよ = whether A or B; を問わず = regardless; 多少 = more or less (adjective)
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:かれ-かれ source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:low complexity:standard
